rows.title: Held-out combined-stress validation of the PSMS-v2 winner
rows.setup_note: Reused the fixed-protocol held-out validator on nominal, hot_plating_combo, hot_sei_combo, and hot_dual_combo. Compared the PSMS-v2 main winner, the EVTBO anchor, and BO_3step_aggressive under the unchanged four-metric comparison contract.
rows.result_summary: UA5_PSMS_3.00C_rest10m_4.30C_e4.50_v4p18_h3.35_1p5m stayed rank-1 under both robust and nominal ordering on heldout_combo_v1. Relative to the EVTBO anchor, mean deltas remained positive and worst-case deltas stayed non-negative across Q30, plating_loss, sei_growth, and total_lli. BO_3step_aggressive dropped to guard_pass_rate=0.0 and robust_utility=-0.6077.
rows.impact_summary: This upgrades the PSMS-v2 line from a strong main-run result to held-out-supported main-text evidence and supports moving directly into paper drafting.
